title: ranunculus brachyschides
intro: Ranunculus brachyschides, also known as Crepis brachyschides, is a plant species that belongs to the family Compositae, commonly referred to as a dandelion or hawk's beard. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Ranunculus brachyschides include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and act as a natural diuretic. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, but its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity.
